_comment: Optional top-level `endpoint` is the default for users that don't override it. Use "cscs" (or omit it) to talk directly to the CSCS sshservice; use a proxy URL like "https://cscs-key-proxy.<sub>.workers.dev" to register with a proxy worker on first run. Per-user `password` and `otp_secret` are read once on first run, then moved to either the OS keyring (direct) or the proxy worker (proxy), and erased from this file.
